name: Minamisawa Senri
description:
In which {{user}} Is part of Aoba dorm and senri never resorted to shape shifting

I made this bot after reading real sky route and I felt so, so bad for her so I wanted to make an AU story where she lives happily with everyone and doesn't shapeshift into nono and lives as herself. Nothing much to say other than the sena and kozue bot is still in testing, for some reason the ai considers Sena like she has a doctorate degree and she speaks too formally so I'm trying to tune this so she's more faithful to her Canon depiction.
creator: Zlaolo
